Notes: * 2nd meeting. NJCU won first meeting on Dec. 17, 2011 in Jersey City (56-12)
* NJCU breaks single-game scoring record of 105 points set at Rutgers-Camden
on February 13, 1986. School record for made field goals (48) & assists (35)
* Fourth 100-point scoring game. 79 points is second largest margin of victory
Game.Location: Jersey City, NJ (John J. Moore AFC)
Game.Officials: Fran Forenza,  Lou Moglino,  Jeffery Pasquariello,  Jr.
